title: Is the 12th Angel actually Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Is the 12th Angel actually Lilith?             Quote Post by Haydenn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 7:53 am Im starting to think that the 12th Angel is actually Lilith for a few reasons. The first is the fact it forms a giant Rei face and i really cant think of any other reason why it would, it also forms an embrio much like Adam from the series. The second is we know Gendo from the series wanted to bring about instrumentality by bringing Adam and Lilith together and that Gendo in rebuild is getting things done his way, via his methods so far. Assuming that unit 13 is Adam based (or just by having Kaoru inside) it enters instrumentality once it eats the 12th angel, possibly bringing together Adam and Lilith. The third reason is we know making Adam (Kaoru) into the 13th Angel was part of the plan so it isn't outside the bounds of possibility that Lilith fell to the 12th. There are two versions of Lilith in Hebrew Mythos one where lilith was created at the same time as Adam by god making them equal (the most likely one to have inspired NGE versions) and one where lucifer created Lilith while god created Adam. "If the version of the creation of Lilith at the hands of Lucifer has any ring of truth then Adam could be held accountable as the first sinner instead of Eve his second wife. Lilith having been the creation of Lucifer and Adam the creation of God the pursuing and the union of Adam appeasing Lilith is Adam going against God. Adam is being misled to sin by pursuing and partaking of the fruit of Lilith with Lilith herself being symbolic of evil. Lucifer's Lilith would be made as a distorted version of God's creation of man, opposite of the nature of God." This representation of Lilith has her literally becoming the fruit of corruption that Adam eats and in the scene with the 12th angel and eva unit 13 the Angel becomes like an apple which is then eaten by the eva. Also this version of Lucifer opposing God has allot of similarity's to Gendos attitude towards 'god' and instrumentality. I may have rambled a bit there, first post, any thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jun 09, 2013 8:47 am No, the 12th Angel is a complete separate entity, Mark.06's impalement was to prevent it to fuse with Lilith. Besides the 12th morphed into Rei's head when it came in contact with the liquid remnants of Lilith, implying that it absorbed her and mutated. We shouldn't base the details of Gendo's of SEELE's plans with the details shown in NGE : SEELE's specifics of their HIP in NTE where already very different from NGE, so it's very plausible that Gendo's plan are also different, the fact he doesn't seem to need Rei is a proof of that, beside there is still the Key of N that he didn't used yet. As for EVA-13, he isn't just ADAM-based, he is one of the 4 ADAMs present during 2I, Mari explicitly calls it a "surviving ADAM".

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jun 09, 2013 8:47 am The Twelfth obviously isn't Lilith! We see Lilith's headless corpse in Central Dogma (the giant, white, headless body-it's kind of hard to miss) and we also see Gendo talking to Lilith's severed head, which has become a giant Rei head. The Twelfth is sealed inside the Mark.06, which is sealed along with Lilith's corpse. Kaworu confirms the corpse as Lilith's, by the way. The Twelfth only forms into a giant Rei head because it interacts with Lilith's liquified remains (Lilith's corpse explodes into red goo once the Spear of Longinus is removed; the Twelfth then absorbs the goo). Lilith's remains are what influence the Twelfth Angel to change shape into a Rei head and an embryo; the Twelfth itself is not Lilith.

[]: Re: *Spoilers* Is the 12th Angel actually Lilith?             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 8:52 am Haydenn wrote: Im starting to think that the 12th Angel is actually Lilith for a few reasons...

[]:             Quote Post by Haydenn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:01 am Ok fair points but first, We don't know that mark 06 was impaled to keep it separate from lilith at all because that's never stated plus mark 06 is fused to liliths neck so that kinda contradicts using a spear to stop it fusing...after its already fused. Also your saying it absorbs lilith and mutates? well that amounts to the same thing, at the point of unit 13's consumption that would make the 12th lilith. Also you both mention the 12th absorbing liliths blood which (just watched again) i never see happen. lilith bursts into blood/goo and settles, mark 6 floats abov it and then gets its head cut off, the angel comes out and never contacts the blood until after it has formed a giant core and started to show Rei's face. It then shrinks and the displacement of the water show that it was not absorbing it but sitting in it, im possibly even likely wrong but the idea of the 12th angel absorbing parts of lilith and being influenced by it it just as much conjecture. Also wouldn't that amount to the same thing? the 12th influenced/mutated by lilith is pretty much the same as it being lilith in the end isn't it? Initially i thought the 12th was Armisael to be honest. Also gret point i keep forgetting there were 4 giants of life in the Rebuild version, are they believed to be Adams?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:10 am Haydenn wrote: Ok fair points but first, We don't know that mark 06 was impaled to keep it separate from lilith at all because that's never stated plus mark 06 is fused to liliths neck so that kinda contradicts using a spear to stop it fusing...after its already fused. Also your saying it absorbs lilith and mutates? well that amounts to the same thing, at the point of unit 13's consumption that would make the 12th lilith. Also you both mention the 12th absorbing liliths blood which (just watched again) i never see happen. lilith bursts into blood/goo and settles, mark 6 floats abov it and then gets its head cut off, the angel comes out and never contacts the blood until after it has formed a giant core and started to show Rei's face. It then shrinks and the displacement of the water show that it was not absorbing it but sitting in it, im possibly even likely wrong but the idea of the 12th angel absorbing parts of lilith and being influenced by it it just as much conjecture. Also wouldn't that amount to the same thing? the 12th influenced/mutated by lilith is pretty much the same as it being lilith in the end isn't it? Initially i thought the 12th was Armisael to be honest.

[]:             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:10 am Haydenn wrote: Also you both mention the 12th absorbing liliths blood which (just watched again) i never see happen. lilith bursts into blood/goo and settles, mark 6 floats abov it and then gets its head cut off, the angel comes out and never contacts the blood until after it has formed a giant core and started to show Rei's face. It then shrinks and the displacement of the water show that it was not absorbing it but sitting in it, im possibly even likely wrong but the idea of the 12th angel absorbing parts of lilith and being influenced by it it just as much conjecture. Also wouldn't that amount to the same thing? the 12th influenced/mutated by lilith is pretty much the same as it being lilith in the end isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:12 am They are referred to as "Adams" in the 2.0 trailer and I think also in the CRC; whether they are separate entities are part of a larger Adam is unknown though.

[]:             Quote Post by Haydenn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:17 am Yea i've watched close, its not absorbing the blood tho at all. It wraps around unit 13 and expands while Asuka shoots it however when it enters the water you see the water breaking against it not absorbing. Then u see it from mari's perspective above and you can see its pushing the wtter awary in waves like when you push anything into water it casts water away in ripples and to the right u see it even pushes the water farther up the little bit of land. If it was absorbing the motion would be the opposite and drawing in. Also when the ball shrinks the water floods into the gap and splashes up the way water does when removing a mass from within. Im more than happy to concede that its not lilith of course but i cant explain things otherwise if not cause i see no evidence of it absorbing anything. It could have absorbed something during its time fused however thats perfectly plausible. Also i forget have they said Rei is lilith in the rebuild yet? I cant remember them ever saying, i know they said She's a Yui clone but is it just assumed she is lilith at this point?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:28 am Since Lilith's severed head becomes a Rei head, and the Twelfth also turns into a Rei head once it enters the blood pool then it seems Rei had Lilith's soul, like in NGE. It isn't confirmed that the Rei who appears in 3.0 has Lilith's soul, however, but it was probably true for the Rei we saw in 1.0 and 2.0, Rei II.

[]:             Quote Post by Haydenn » Sun Jun 09, 2013 9:31 am Yea that's how i've been looking at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Mon Jun 10, 2013 5:30 pm Rei is definitely have lilith soul. But I think when the first Rei from 1 and 2 was absorbed into the core of unit 01.... well that means unit 01 could be an adam and have lilith in its core as well? wtf? god status?

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Sun Jul 14, 2013 7:30 pm Crazy theory: in NGE we know: a angel + Adam = Adam ressurection; in 1.11 Misato says that if a angel contacts lilith the 3Impact will occurs; in 3.33 Mark06 fused with the angel reaches Lilith. So... maybe the embryo tihng we see perhaps is not the angel (at that time may have died). Maybe the embryo is Lilith reviving (yes this is crazy, but I needed to talk )

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jul 14, 2013 7:33 pm ElMariachi wrote: Besides the 12th morphed into Rei's head when it came in contact with the liquid remnants of Lilith, implying that it absorbed her and muted .

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 15, 2013 3:02 am @ andreh : but the Mark.06 is heavily implied to be one of the four ADAMs, and the 12th Angel is, well, an Angel, so would them reaching Lilith logically bring an Impact, and not resurrect Lilith? Although truth be told we don't even know how SEELE planned to resurrect her. Maybe that was through the "forbidden union", but one under SEELE's control, and that an Angel reaching Lilith would resurrect her under a new form with both Fruits... As always, we lack informations about the time skip to have a proper answer! @ TheFriskyIan : yes, that's what I meant, I corrected it, thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jul 15, 2013 3:25 am I don't think resurrecting is a good choice of word, Lilith was never "dead". If it's similar to the original series, she's just lacking a soul. But her body is perfectly fine and alive, and the spear is here to keep it from regenerating.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 15, 2013 4:11 am Well, in 1.0 and 2.0 SEELE was always talking about "resurrecting" Lilith, so from their point of view the crucified giant was "dead"(maybe they meant "soulless"), but in 3.0 she was definitively dead : Kaworu described it as a corpse, and when the spears were removed, said corpse collapsed in LCL. It's possible that in NTE the lance was in Lilith since the beginning to prevent a collapse because her soul was elsewhere(Rei?)

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jul 15, 2013 4:54 am Actually does anyone know why Seele/Nerv wanted to prevent Lilith's regeneration with a longinus spear? It's not like she would miraculously grow a new soul or something. What was the purpose behind that move?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Jul 15, 2013 5:15 am I think it would have somehow ruined or changed their scenario if Lilith had not have LoL piercing her. Feel free to guess/speculate how.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 15, 2013 7:42 am Maybe her body can still move even without a soul, but will only act by instinct, wrecking the place(like what happened during the time skip?), so to keep her from now mindless body in check, SEELE made her body be impaled by the LoL which kept her "frozen".
